audit.summary: Dicki's New Farm has an existing website, and the strongest useful gap is: core services are not instantly clear.

findings.title: Core services are not instantly clear
findings.evidence: Expected services were not all visible in captured text: Vegan restaurant, Vegetarian restaurant.
findings.fix: Show 3-5 core services near the top with plain-language outcomes.

findings.title: Trust signal is not strong in the first screen
findings.evidence: The first captured text block does not clearly surface reviews, warranty, credentials, years, or local proof.
findings.fix: Add a compact trust strip near the hero: reviews, warranty/licence claims when verified, service area, and response promise.

findings.title: Proof is not doing enough work
findings.evidence: The captured text does not clearly surface reviews, project proof, warranty, licences, or gallery proof.
findings.fix: Add a proof section with real reviews, project examples, and verified guarantees/credentials.

offerAngle: I noticed your site has a fixable conversion gap: Expected services were not all visible in captured text: Vegan restaurant, Vegetarian restaurant.
proofPoints: 707 Google reviews listed in Maps scrape
coldMessageDraft: Hey Dicki's, I was looking at Dicki's New Farm in Brisbane. I noticed your site has a fixable conversion gap: Expected services were not all visible in captured text: Vegan restaurant, Vegetarian restaurant. I made a quick note on what I would tighten first; happy to send it over if useful.
followUpDraft: Quick follow-up on Dicki's New Farm: the main opportunity I noticed is Show 3-5 core services near the top with plain-language outcomes.. Worth me sending the short audit?
guardrails: This is a draft, not a final send.
Do not mention review body text.
Do not claim Google API verification until it has been run.
Find email/contact path only after operator accepts the offer angle.
